rag_support.title: MRT Putrajaya Line Service Disruption (Taman Naga Emas)
rag_support.chunk_text: MRT Putrajaya Line service was disrupted in February 2024 between Taman Naga Emas and Sungai Besi stations due to a trespasser incident, affecting thousands of early morning commuters.

rag_support.title: Severe Gridlock at Sungai Besi Toll (July 2024)
rag_support.chunk_text: Massive traffic jams were reported at the Sungai Besi toll plaza on July 29, 2024, due to unannounced police roadblocks, causing significant delays for commuters entering Kuala Lumpur.

rag_support.title: DBKL: Jalan Sungai Besi Upgrade (Sept 2023 - Sept 2024)
rag_support.chunk_text: Kuala Lumpur City Hall (DBKL) is executing a major infrastructure upgrade for Jalan Sungai Besi. The project involves phased road closures and bridge construction, scheduled to continue through September 2024.

rag_support.title: Scheduled Road Works on Sungai Besi Highway (2024)
rag_support.chunk_text: Besraya and LLM are conducting scheduled road maintenance on the Sungai Besi Highway from August 1 to December 31, 2024. Phased nightly lane closures (10PM-6AM) are expected to cause periodic disruptions.

rules: Structured data (SQL) is the PRIMARY evidence and must be trusted over RAG news.
You must cite at least one specific RAG source by title in your summary.
If RAG evidence contradicts SQL data, prioritize the SQL data.
Focus heavily on issues specific to Sungai Besi.
blocked_claims: Do not invent exact percentage growth numbers unless explicitly stated in the evidence.
Do not claim a service is 'excellent' if there are active complaints in the pack.
Do not mention other cities besides Sungai Besi.

rag_support.title: Official Route: Stesen LRT Awan Besar ~ Pavilion Bukit Jalil (PAVILION BUKIT JALIL (PAVBJ))
rag_support.chunk_text: This is an official Bus route in the transport network. Route ID: PAVILION BUKIT JALIL (PAVBJ). Long Name: Stesen LRT Awan Besar ~ Pavilion Bukit Jalil.

rag_support.title: Area: Bukit Jalil (suburb)
rag_support.chunk_text: Identified district/neighborhood 'Bukit Jalil' in Kuala Lumpur. Type: suburb. This area is used for geographical boundary validation and localized infrastructure analysis.

rag_support.title: Bukit Jalil's Growth Momentum 2024
rag_support.chunk_text: Bukit Jalil continues to solidify its position as one of the Klang Valley's most dynamic growth corridors, supported by modern infrastructure and Pavilion Bukit Jalil transformation into a fully integrated hub.

rag_support.title: Official Route: Stesen LRT Alam Sutera ~ PPR Pinggiran Bukit Jalil (T581)
rag_support.chunk_text: This is an official Bus route in the transport network. Route ID: T581. Long Name: Stesen LRT Alam Sutera ~ PPR Pinggiran Bukit Jalil.

rag_support.title: KL roads flooded - Bukit Jalil affected
rag_support.chunk_text: Heavy rainfall in October 2023 led to significant flash floods across Kuala Lumpur, severely affecting major routes including the Bukit Jalil area. These disruptions highlight infrastructure vulnerabilities.
